# FreeMind CE ${version}

## Installation

### macOS
Download `FreeMind-CE-${version}-macOS.dmg` and drag to Applications.

> **Note:** macOS may show "unidentified developer" warning. Right-click the app and select Open, then click Open in the dialog.

### Windows
Download `FreeMind-CE-${version}-Windows.exe` and run the installer.

> **Note:** Windows SmartScreen may show a warning. Click "More info" then "Run anyway".

### Linux (Debian/Ubuntu)
```bash
sudo dpkg -i FreeMind-CE-${version}-Linux.deb
```

### Cross-platform JAR
```bash
java -jar FreeMind-CE-${version}.jar
```

## Checksums

Verify your download with `SHA256SUMS.txt` included in the release assets:
```bash
sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS.txt
```
